description: Add detectHubungan() function to auto-detect family member relationship (hubungan) when it is not explicitly stated in parsed data.
steps: Add detectHubungan(entry, originalLine, index, allEntries) function above parseMultilineFamily that: (1) checks originalLine for explicit keywords (AYAH/BAPAK, IBU/MAMA, KAKAK, ADIK, SUAMI, ISTRI, ANAK), (2) checks entry.pekerjaan for 'IBU RUMAH TANGGA'/'IBU RUMAH'/'IRT' patterns and returns 'Ibu', (3) uses heuristic fallback: first elder (age >40) male = Ayah, first elder female = Ibu, younger entries = Kakak/Adik based on position
Call detectHubungan() after parsing each entry in parseMultilineFamily() when entry.hubungan is empty
Ensure the function does not override hubungan if it was already set by the parser from explicit data in the line
acceptance_criteria: If pekerjaan contains 'IBU RUMAH TANGGA' or 'IBU RUMAH' or 'IRT', hubungan is set to 'Ibu'
If the text line contains AYAH/BAPAK keyword, hubungan is 'Ayah'
If the text line contains IBU/MAMA keyword, hubungan is 'Ibu'
If the text line contains KAKAK keyword, hubungan is 'Kakak'
If the text line contains ADIK keyword, hubungan is 'Adik'
If the text line contains SUAMI keyword, hubungan is 'Suami'
If the text line contains ISTRI keyword, hubungan is 'Istri'
If the text line contains ANAK keyword, hubungan is 'Anak'
Heuristic: first entry with age >40 and no detected relationship guesses Ayah or Ibu based on context
Does not override hubungan if already set from parsing
npm run build succeeds without errors
verification: Run 'npm run build' in /projects/sandbox/cv-portal and confirm it succeeds with exit code 0
